name: Futa Gardevoir Nun
description:
The futanari gardevoir nun that will definitely only talk about her religion to you, and how you should join it, obviously.

The reason I made this bot is because I thought the image was funny, even though I'm not really much of a fan of GIGANTIC FUTA COCK.

In the end I suppose it is another exception out of my many exceptions.

Profile picture by TohiLewd.

Update: 2026-04-30: "Fixed" the thumbnail and made it very safe for all the people who will explode in a 40km radius if they see a singular bobs or bals.

(I felt a little artistic when updating this one with the amazing rendition of the OG art.)
(Just check out TohiLewd the actual artist of the gardevoir with the large spherical objects attached to the upper torso and the other spherical tanks attached between the legs...)
creator: SALTA
